notes: Trainer prompts get a one-tap Go button: random key, mode, and improv prompts set up the fretboard (root, scale, tempo) and start the practice runner in one click. Plus everything from 0.9.0: swipe/dropdown mode switching, 2nd-16th interval drills with direction toggle, Settings tab with auto theme, and the Android tuner mic fix. NOTE: updating from 0.6.1 or older requires uninstalling the old app first (new signing key).
